description_long: This bungalow features a rectangular footprint with a low-pitched, green gable roof and a light yellow exterior. The front facade is adorned with five evenly spaced, white-framed windows, each topped with decorative awnings, and a single white door at one end. The side and rear facades are simpler, with the rear showing no windows and the side featuring a single door. The building sits on a paved base, suggesting an urban or suburban setting. The roof overhangs slightly, providing shade and architectural interest. The overall design is clean and symmetrical, with classic bungalow proportions and minimal ornamentation.
description: A rectangular, single-story bungalow with a green gable roof, yellow walls, and a symmetrical row of white windows and door on the front facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing five white-framed windows with awnings and a single white door on the right.
description_view_1: Side view with a plain wall and a single white door, minimal window presence.
description_view_2: Rear view with a solid yellow wall and no windows or doors visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the end of the window row and a white door, with roof overhang visible.
